examples: Free exchange of goods was advantageous to all.
A free trade agreement would be advantageous to both countries.
Meteorite impacts can be advantageous for some species, which thrive, and disastrous for other species, which become extinct.
In theory, Ferrari could use Raikkonen to "back up" Hamilton in a way that is advantageous for Massa.
From the perspective of displacing fossil-fuel use, solar thermal water heater systems are even more advantageous.
